svg.title: WGDSS Comprehensive Top-Down Data and Logic Flow
svg.desc: A top-down visual showing startup, live weather and simulated grid acquisition, SCADA calibration, probability and recommendation logic, persistence, API response, dashboard rendering, and independent map overlays.
svg.text: Top-down data movement, processing logic, safeguards, persistence, and operator presentation
SNAPSHOT REQUEST AND CONCURRENT DATA ACQUISITION

g.text: DashboardService launches weather, forecast, grid, and generation work concurrently
Forecast: Best Match + MET Norway + NOAA GFS
Trinidad clock selects demand period and MW level
Read imported SCADA temperature and profiles
Build Hot, Typical, and Rainy 24-hour curves
Select regime using live weather similarity
Hourly consensus, spread, confidence, source names
Selected SCADA temperature at current hour
Current/next profile demand and spinning reserve

svg.text: PROBABILITY, DEMAND FORECAST, RISK, AND RECOMMENDATION

g.text: + scenario demand and low spin pressure
Prefer selected SCADA temperature; otherwise use live temperature
Record every triggered condition as an explainability factor
Weather pressure + horizon modifier + scenario blend + 92% floor
3. Classify risk and select operator action
Reserve below 15% forces HIGH / START ADDITIONAL TURBINE
it does not dispatch generation automatically.

svg.text: SNAPSHOT ASSEMBLY, QUALITY GATES, AND PERSISTENCE

g.text: Database failure degrades quality, not delivery
One response for the complete UI
Failure → error state and manual retry

svg.text: CONTROL-ROOM PRESENTATION AND INDEPENDENT MAP CONTEXT

g.text: Persistent left map + shared right-side tab workspace
Live snapshot values populate cards, charts, risk gauge, reasoning, and scenario analytics.
Loading → ready → error/retry state; automatic refresh every five minutes.
NASA GIBS cloud systems + IMERG rainfall
Dashboard wind marker + optional Open-Meteo wind flow
Optional NHC storms through cached backend endpoint
VISUAL CONTEXT ONLY — DOES NOT ALTER RECOMMENDATIONS

svg.text: Operational boundary: weather and calibration can be live/historical; Version 1 grid conditions remain simulated through MockGridProvider.
WGDSS engineering reference · generated from the current repository structure
